{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks about the common situation for transient tachypnea of the newborn (TTN). Reviewing the documents, Document [22] (Title: Transient Tachypnea of the Newborn -- Etiology) clearly states that cesarean delivery without labor is a well-established predisposing factor for TTN.
